parameters.content:
## Generic Form Submissions Workflow

Accepts POST requests at `/webhook/forms` with payload:
```json
{ "form_type": "some-form", "data": { ... } }
```

Inserts into the `form_submissions` table with JSONB data column.

### Email Notifications
After insert, routes by `form_type` to send:
- **Admin notification** to daniel.snell@ (cc: courtney.gwynn@)
- **User confirmation** to the submitter's email

Supported forms: `texas-tech-compute`, `watts-for-workers`

### Editing Emails
Edit the `.mjml` source files in `emails/`, then run:
```
cd emails && for f in *.mjml; do [[ "$f" == _* ]] && continue; mjml "$f" -o "${f%.mjml}.html" --config.minify true; done
```
Then run `node build-workflow.js` to regenerate this workflow JSON.

parameters.query: INSERT INTO form_submissions (form_type, data) VALUES ($1, $2::jsonb) RETURNING id, form_type, created_at

parameters.subject: =New Compute Inquiry: {{ $('Validate Input').item.json.data.first_name }} {{ $('Validate Input').item.json.data.last_name }}
parameters.html:
=
New Compute Inquiry
A new inquiry has been submitted for Texas Tech computing power.

{{ $('Validate Input').item.json.data.first_name }} {{ $('Validate Input').item.json.data.last_name }}

TIMELINE

ADDITIONAL NOTES

ThisWay Global · Austin, TX

parameters.subject: =Thank You for Your Inquiry
parameters.html:
=
Inquiry Received
Thank you for your interest in Texas Tech computing power.

Hi {{ $('Validate Input').item.json.data.first_name }},
Thank you for reaching out about Texas Tech computing resources. We've received your inquiry and our team is reviewing the details. Someone from ThisWay Global will be in touch with you shortly to discuss your computing needs.
COMPANY
{{ $('Validate Input').item.json.data.company }}
TIMELINE
{{ $('Validate Input').item.json.data.urgency }}
Best regards,
The ThisWay Global Team
ThisWay Global · Austin, TX
